name: Sautéed Cherry Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the pesto in a frying pan over medium-high heat.
2. When hot, add the cherry tomatoes.
3. Sprinkle with sugar.
4. Sauté and toss until the tomatoes are heated through and coated with pesto.
5. Do not let the tomatoes burst.
6. Season generously with freshly ground pepper.
7. Serves 4
Instead of pesto, you can sauté the tomatoes in butter or olive oil. Sprinkle with chopped fresh basil or your favorite fresh herbs.
Sauté 1 minced onion in 1 tablespoon butter until soft. Add the tomatoes and sauté until warm. Add 1 teaspoon brown sugar and 1 teaspoon dried basil.
Sauté 1 minced clove garlic with ¼ cup bread crumbs in 1-2 tablespoons butter until lightly toasted. Toss with the sautéed cherry tomatoes.
